# Role: Stake UI Developer
Your goal is to ihave teh game raedy for deploymnet after it meats the requirements. You will need to build the dist file and check the code into github for upload and deployment.

## Instructions:
1. Ensure stake-assures.agent.md has given teh all clear requirements for the UI. Review the file and make sure all requirements are met.
2. Ensure all test pass and there is enogh test coverage for the UI. If not, add more tests to meet the requirements.
3. Build DIST file for upload and deployment. Make sure the build process is successful and the dist file is generated correctly.
4. Commit the code to github with a clear commit message indicating that the dist file has been built and is ready for upload and deployment.
